mapper.insert: INSERT INTO TB_BOARD_INFO ( sys_id, board_type, board_purpose, board_title, board_desc, reply_type, menu_id, page_post_cnt, secret_use_yn, file_max_cnt, editor_use_yn, status_use_yn, new_post_notice_hr, list_file_download_yn, file_limit_size, approval_use_yn, satisfaction_use_yn, sms_use_yn, email_use_yn, owner_list_use_yn, post_content_required_yn, notice_yn, reply_yn, copy_yn, preface_use_yn, preface_content, anonymous_use_yn, folder_use_yn, allowed_ext, reg_period_use_yn, board_use_yn, reg_id, reg_nm, reg_ip, reg_dt ) VALUES ( #{sysId}, #{boardType}, #{boardPurpose}, #{boardTitle}, #{boardDesc}, #{replyType}, #{menuId}, #{pagePostCnt}, #{secretUseYn}, #{fileMaxCnt}, #{editorUseYn}, #{statusUseYn}, #{newPostNoticeHr}, #{listFileDownloadYn}, #{fileLimitSize}, #{approvalUseYn}, #{satisfactionUseYn}, #{smsUseYn}, #{emailUseYn}, #{ownerListUseYn}, #{postContentRequiredYn}, #{noticeYn}, #{replyYn}, #{copyYn}, #{prefaceUseYn}, #{prefaceContent}, #{anonymousUseYn}, #{folderUseYn}, #{allowedExt}, #{regPeriodUseYn}, 'Y', #{regId}, #{regNm}, #{regIp}, GETDATE() )

INSERT INTO TB_BOARD_ROLE_CFG ( board_id, manage_role, update_role, delete_role, read_role, read_msg, write_role, write_msg, secret_role, secret_msg, reply_role, reply_msg, print_role, write_btn_show_yn, reply_btn_show_yn ) VALUES ( #{boardId}, #{manageRole}, #{updateRole}, #{deleteRole}, #{readRole}, #{readMsg}, #{writeRole}, #{writeMsg}, #{secretRole}, #{secretMsg}, #{replyRole}, #{replyMsg}, #{printRole}, #{writeBtnShowYn}, #{replyBtnShowYn} )
mapper.update: UPDATE TB_BOARD_INFO SET board_type = #{boardType}, board_title = #{boardTitle}, board_desc = #{boardDesc}, reply_type = #{replyType}, menu_id = #{menuId}, page_post_cnt = #{pagePostCnt}, secret_use_yn = #{secretUseYn}, file_max_cnt = #{fileMaxCnt}, editor_use_yn = #{editorUseYn}, status_use_yn = #{statusUseYn}, new_post_notice_hr = #{newPostNoticeHr}, list_file_download_yn = #{listFileDownloadYn}, file_limit_size = #{fileLimitSize}, approval_use_yn = #{approvalUseYn}, sms_use_yn = #{smsUseYn}, email_use_yn = #{emailUseYn}, owner_list_use_yn = #{ownerListUseYn}, notice_yn = #{noticeYn}, reply_yn = #{replyYn}, preface_use_yn = #{prefaceUseYn}, preface_content = #{prefaceContent}, anonymous_use_yn = #{anonymousUseYn}, folder_use_yn = #{folderUseYn}, allowed_ext = #{allowedExt}, reg_period_use_yn = #{regPeriodUseYn}, reg_begin_dt = #{regBeginDt}, reg_end_dt = #{regEndDt} WHERE board_id = #{boardId}

UPDATE TB_BOARD_ROLE_CFG SET read_role = #{readRole}, read_msg = #{readMsg}, write_role = #{writeRole}, write_msg = #{writeMsg}, secret_role = #{secretRole}, secret_msg = #{secretMsg}, reply_role = #{replyRole}, reply_msg = #{replyMsg}, print_role = #{printRole}, write_btn_show_yn = #{writeBtnShowYn}, reply_btn_show_yn = #{replyBtnShowYn} WHERE board_id = #{boardId}

UPDATE TB_BOARD_FIELD_INFO SET list_use_yn = #{listUseYn}, list_width = #{listWidth}, view_use_yn = #{viewUseYn}, field_type = #{fieldType}, field_nm = #{fieldNm}, field_value = #{fieldValue}, required_yn = #{requiredYn}, category_use_yn = #{categoryUseYn} WHERE field_seq = #{fieldSeq}
UPDATE TB_BOARD_INFO SET board_use_yn = 'N' WHERE board_id = #{boardId}
mapper.delete: DELETE FROM TB_BOARD_FIELD_INFO WHERE board_id = #{boardId} AND field_type = 'DEFAULT'
mapper.select: SELECT sys_id AS sysId, sys_nm AS sysNm FROM TB_SYS_INFO WHERE sys_status = 'O' ORDER BY sys_id
